prediction.reasoning: For an 18-day prediction of Goldman Sachs stock, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model with estimated annualized volatility of ~25% typical for financial stocks. The point estimate assumes no drift (random walk). Confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty with higher confidence levels, with daily volatility of ~1.6% scaled over 18 days. The symmetric intervals around the current price reflect the unpredictable nature of short-term stock movements.
